g.text: Raft Node Persistent State (On-Disk WAL Structure)

ul.li: Term/Vote must flush to disk before acknowledging RPC.
Snapshotting triggers at log size threshold (e.g., 512MB).
Majority = (N/2) + 1 nodes must respond for commit.
Linearizability: ReadIndex protocol or 50ms leader leases.

g.title: Responds to RPCs from candidates and leaders
Increment term, vote for self, gather majority

ul.li: Nodes {A, B} isolated from {C, D, E}
Term N -> N+1 in Majority Partition

g.text: ▸ T5: Discover higher Term or Leader

g.title: Responds to RPCs from candidates and leaders
Increment term, vote for self, gather majority
